# ZPHS Mallelamadugu

> Zilla Parishad High School (ZPHS) Mallelamadugu is a government secondary school in Mallelamadugu Village, Aswapuram Mandal, Bhadradri Kothagudem District, Telangana, India. Established in 1995, it teaches Classes 6 to 10 with free tuition, textbooks, uniforms and a mid-day meal under the Government of Telangana.

Key facts:
- Type: Government Zilla Parishad High School (fully government-aided)
- Location: Mallelamadugu Village, Aswapuram Mandal, Bhadradri Kothagudem District, Telangana, India
- Established: 1995
- Grades served: Classes 6, 7, 8, 9, 10
- Headmaster: K. Gopi Varaprasad Rao
- Phone (Headmaster, also WhatsApp): +91 92471 71248
- Admission enquiries via WhatsApp: +91 98482 98256
- School hours: Monday – Saturday, 9:00 AM – 4:30 PM (closed on government holidays)
- Languages: English, Telugu
- Website: https://zphsmallelamadugu.github.io/

Recent achievements (2025-26):
- 100% pass rate in the SSC (10th class) board exam
- Mandal topper with 551 / 600 marks
- 4 students scored above 500 / 600
- 4 consecutive years of NMMS (National Means-cum-Merit) Scholarship qualifiers
- Active participation in district-level academic, cultural and sports competitions

Facilities (all free for enrolled students):
- Computer lab
- Science lab (physics, chemistry, biology)
- Sports ground (kabaddi, kho-kho, cricket, athletics)
- Government-provided textbooks and school uniforms
- Mid-day meal scheme

## Pages

- [Home](https://zphsmallelamadugu.github.io/): Overview, hero stats, navigation to all sections
- [About](https://zphsmallelamadugu.github.io/#about): School history, philosophy and a message from the Headmaster
- [Achievements](https://zphsmallelamadugu.github.io/#achievements): Board results, scholarships and competition participation
- [Facilities](https://zphsmallelamadugu.github.io/#facilities): Campus amenities and government-supported services
- [Moments](https://zphsmallelamadugu.github.io/#moments): Photo gallery from school life
- [Admissions](https://zphsmallelamadugu.github.io/#admissions): Open enrolment for Classes 6 to 10 with online enquiry form
- [Contact](https://zphsmallelamadugu.github.io/#contact): Address, phone, school hours
